'''Feragriffs''' were wild predators native to [[Batorine]]. They were ritually hunted by [[Blood Carver]]s during rite of passage ceremonies. As Blood Carvers moved to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], they brought with them the Feragriffs so as to preserve their customs.

{{Creature-stub}}
